The '''''First Anthology''''' Star Wars Customizable Card Game was released May [[1997]].

Each set contained two white-bordered Premiere starter decks, two [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']] expansion packs, two [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] expansion packs, and the 11-card premium [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Pack. Six white-bordered preview cards were included:

*[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]
*[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]
*[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba's]] Influence
*[[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-Wing]] Assault Squadron
*Hit and Run
*[[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] Assault Squadron

All six cards were later reprinted as black-bordered cards in the Special Edition set.

The First Anthology was released in a long, 800-count card box that was completely black, with the Star Wars Customizable Card Game logo on the lid.
